differentials.name: Hypoechoic = low-echogenicity plaque =  fibrofatty plaque / hemorrhage
differentials.raw: Hypoechoic = low-echogenicity plaque =  fibrofatty plaque / hemorrhage

differentials.name: Isoechoic plaque =  smooth muscle cell proliferation / laminar thrombus
differentials.raw: Isoechoic plaque =  smooth muscle cell proliferation / laminar thrombus

differentials.name: Heterogeneous (unstable) plaque =  mixture of high, medium, and low-level echoes with smooth / irregular surface; may fissure / tear resulting in intraplaque hemorrhage / ulceration + thrombus formation → embolus / increasing stenosis
differentials.raw: Heterogeneous (unstable) plaque =  mixture of high, medium, and low-level echoes with smooth / irregular surface; may fissure / tear resulting in intraplaque hemorrhage / ulceration + thrombus formation → embolus / increasing stenosis

differentials.name: Error in proper localization of stenosis
differentials.raw: Error in proper localization of stenosis (6%)

context: √  echogenicity less than sternocleidomastoid muscle √  flow void / flow disturbance on color Duplex √  echogenicity equal to sternocleidomastoid muscle + lower than adventitia √  echogenicity higher than sternocleidomastoid muscle + similar to adventitia √  acoustic shadow impairs visualization of intima Texture of Carotid Plaque Histo:  deposition of fatty streaks + fibrous tissue; rarely shows intraplaque hemorrhage / ulcerations √  homogeneous uniform echo pattern with smooth surface (acoustic impedance similar to blood) B-mode ultrasound has 90-94% sensitivity, 75-88% specificity, 90% acc
